title: Book layout
text:
Worked examples in the text appear with
a pencil sign next to them in the left margin.  Advanced or
difficult material appears in sections or subsections
indicated with scissors in the margin.
Exercises are marked in the margin with a question mark.
The level of difficulty of exercises is indicated as
easy (), medium (), or difficult ().© 2008 Cambridge University PressThis is an automatically generated page. In case of formatting errors you may want to look at thePDF editionof the book.2009-04-07
